    <item>

        <title>Grayson Allen: Game-time call for Friday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/grayson-allen-4454</link>
        <description>Allen (hamstring) is questionable for Friday's Play-In Tournament game against the Warriors.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 16 Apr 2026 5:25:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529420</guid>
        <title>Mark Williams: Tagged questionable for Friday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/mark-williams-5647</link>
        <description>Williams is questionable for Friday's Play-In Tournament game against the Warriors due to left foot soreness.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 16 Apr 2026 5:23:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529418</guid>
        <title>Kristaps Porzingis: Listed questionable for Friday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/kristaps-porzingis-3669</link>
        <description>Porzingis is questionable for Friday's Play-In Tournament game against the Suns due to right ankle soreness.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 16 Apr 2026 5:11:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529415</guid>
        <title>Joel Embiid: Likely to miss start of playoffs</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/joel-embiid-3572</link>
        <description>ESPN's Shams Charania reported Thursday on NBA Today that Embiid (abdomen) isn't expected to be available for the start of the playoffs.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 16 Apr 2026 12:45:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529408</guid>
        <title>Jock Landale: Out at least two more weeks</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jock-landale-4562</link>
        <description>The Hawks announced Thursday that Landale (ankle) is progressing in his rehabilitation and will be re-evaluated in approximately two weeks.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Thu, 16 Apr 2026 7:10:00 AM PDT</pubDate>
